description: Ground truth questions and answers for RAG system validation

test_categories.description: Direct factual questions that require exact information retrieval

questions.question: Who are the authors of the paper on Integrated Systems for NGS Data Management?
questions.expected_answer: Valerio Bianchi, Arnaud Ceol, Alessandro G. E. Ogier, Stefano de Pretis, Eugenia Galeota, Kamal Kishore, Pranami Bora, Ottavio Croci, Stefano Campaner, Bruno Amati, Marco J. Morelli, and Mattia Pelizzola

questions.question: What is HTS-flow?
questions.expected_answer: HTS-flow is a workflow management system designed to address NGS data management concerns, able to retrieve information from a LIMS database, manage data analyses through a GUI, output data in standard locations, and allow complete traceability of datasets

questions.question: What are the five key issues identified for research groups approaching NGS technologies?
questions.expected_answer: 1) Adopting a LIMS and safeguarding data structure, 2) Monitoring data flow and standardizing directories/filenames, 3) Ensuring complete traceability, 4) Enabling non-expert users through GUI, 5) Using standard metadata and controlled vocabularies

questions.question: When was the Integrated Systems for NGS Data Management paper published?

test_categories.description: Questions requiring semantic understanding and synthesis

questions.question: Why is data management challenging for NGS technologies?
What problems does a LIMS solve in NGS workflows?

test_categories.description: Questions requiring information from multiple papers

questions.question: What bioinformatics methods are discussed across these papers?

test_categories.description: Questions about specific technical terminology (tests BM25 sparse search)
Questions about numbers, dates, statistics (tests table/figure extraction)

questions.question: What year was the paper published?

test_categories.description: Questions that should return 'information not found' (tests false positive rate)

questions.question: What is the cost of running HTS-flow?
Who won the 2023 Nobel Prize in Chemistry?

test_categories.description: Questions with expected intra-document citations that should be preserved, and expected corpus citation counts

questions.question: Summarize the methods section of fgene-07-00075.pdf, preserving all paper references
questions.notes: Output should contain both verbatim author-year refs AND numbered [N] corpus refs

questions.question: What tools does the paper reference for NGS analysis?
questions.notes: Check that corpus citations point to real chunks, not hallucinated pages

test_categories.description: Questions requiring multi-paper synthesis with proper multi-source attribution

questions.question: Compare the data management approaches described across these papers
questions.notes: Output must cite at least 2 different source documents in the Sources section

questions.question: What are the common challenges in bioinformatics data analysis discussed across the corpus?
questions.notes: Synthesis quality: does the answer integrate findings rather than just listing per-paper?
